claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented and pushed review queue and semantic job settlement gates for DinoBrain. Added current-vault and regression reporting that classifies every candidate/review item with decision class, reason, evidence paths, owner, and next action, writes `.dino/state/wiki-review-queue.json` and `.dino/state/semantic_jobs.json`, and requires these gates in verify:goal. Current vault result before close: 567 open review items, all 567 classified, 0 unclassified; 567 semantic jobs classified_hold/manual_review, 0 unclassified; status freshness had 7 fresh checks after refreshing indexes and audit.
